old_claim.note: Microscope provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: Jenner's 1796 procedure transferred visible cowpox material and demonstrated protection without observing a pathogen microscopically.

source_shape.source_locator: Vaccination section: describes Jenner transferring cowpox material to James Phipps in 1796 and testing the resulting protection before publishing in 1798.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: Jenner demonstrated cowpox-based protection against smallpox through inoculation in 1796.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: The scoped evidence establishes the milestone without the removed dependency. Jenner's 1796 procedure transferred visible cowpox material and demonstrated protection without observing a pathogen microscopically.

ontology_before: vaccination treated microscope as a direct causal prerequisite.
ontology_after: vaccination is scoped to the directly evidenced mechanism and no longer claims microscope as a prerequisite.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed and locked by graph invariant 2026-07-12-structural-accuracy-batch: vaccination no longer directly depends on microscope.
would_reject_if: A reliable source demonstrates that every implementation within the current vaccination scope technically requires microscope.
short_reason: Jenner's 1796 procedure transferred visible cowpox material and demonstrated protection without observing a pathogen microscopically.
